abilities.name: Chasing Fate
abilities.text: When this model is dealt damage, it may drain a (soulstone) to reduce an amount of damage equal to the turn number.

abilities.name: Cumbersome
abilities.text: This model may not scale terrain.

abilities.name: Lone Rider
abilities.text: This model may not be targeted by the actions of friendly models.

abilities.name: Nemesis ((magic))
abilities.text: The (magic) abilities of enemy models within 3" are blank.

actions.name: Chain Spear
actions.costs_and_restrictions: When this action is declared, choose if it has a range of "(melee)1" or "(missile)8".

triggers.name: Arcane Ritual
triggers.text: Once per activation. Draw a number of cards equal to the turn number, then discard a number of cards equal to the turn number -1.

actions.name: Revel in Creation
actions.effects: Each enemy model within range may discard a card. This model may make one Scheme marker into base contact with every enemy model within range that does not discard a card.

triggers.name: Clockwork Revelation
triggers.text: Once per game. Select a Strategy marker within range and place it within 6" of its location, not in base contact with any model(s).

actions.name: Ride With Me
actions.costs_and_restrictions: This model may target another friendly model of lower Sz.
actions.effects: Move this model up to 5". Then, if this action targeted another friendly model, place the friendly model into base contact with this model.

triggers.name: Twist Fate
triggers.text: Once per activation. Select up to five non-joker cards across any discard piles; they are shuffled back into the appropriate deck(s).
